title: gillena
intro: Gillena, also known as Phyllanthus niruri or Chanca piedra, is a tropical plant native to the Americas, commonly found in the wetlands and along rivers. The plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of gillena include its ability to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve liver function. Gillena can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often consumed as a natural remedy to promote overall well-being.
